title: Better Together
lesson: Working together as a team gets the job done and is much more fun.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image onto a sunny sandy beach. The person from the input image kneels alone building a sandcastle, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, with a determined expression. A bucket and spade beside them, bright sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels in the sand as part of the sandcastle wall crumbles, facing the camera with a frustrated, disappointed expression and the face fully visible. Scattered sand and a tipped bucket, sunny beach, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A beach scene. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels on the far left by the sandcastle, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible with a hopeful expression. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} and {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} walk up offering to help. Eye-level medium-wide shot, bright sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is on the far left patting sand onto a growing sandcastle, facing the camera with a focused, happy expression and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} carries a bucket of water and {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} digs sand, all working together. Eye-level medium-wide shot, sunny beach, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels on the far left beside a tall finished sandcastle with towers and a little flag, facing the camera with a proud, delighted smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} and {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} admire it happily. Bright beach light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left with arms raised in celebration beside the grand sandcastle, facing the camera with a big joyful smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} and {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} cheer together. Golden seaside light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: On the sunny beach you worked hard, building a sandcastle all by yourself.
But the wall crumbled down! You frowned. It was tricky to do all alone.
Just then two friends came over. "Can we help?" they asked. "Yes, please!" you said.
Together you patted sand, carried water and dug. Working as a team, the castle grew tall!
At last your sandcastle stood proud, with towers and a little flag. "We made it!" you cheered.
You threw your arms up high and celebrated together. Better together — teamwork is much more fun!
